message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "theorem size_eq_zero_iff_eq_empty (p : Nat.Partition) : p.size = 0 ↔ p = empty := by
  constructor
  · intro h
    have hsum : p.entries.sum = 0 := by
      simpa [size] using h
    have hnull : p.entries = [] := by
      by_contra hne
      have hzero : ∀ a ∈ p.entries, a = 0 :=
        List.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp hsum
      have hpos : ∀ a ∈ p.entries, 0 < a := p.pos
      obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := List.exists_mem_of_ne_nil hne
      have hz := hzero a ha
      have hp := hpos a ha
      exact (lt_irrefl 0) (hz ▸ hp)
    apply Nat.Partition.ext
    exact hnull
  · intro h
    rw [h]
    simp [size, empty]",
  "declaration_name": "size_eq_zero_iff_eq_empty",
  "used_context": [
    "Nat.Partition",
    "size",
    "empty",
    "Nat.Partition.ext",
    "List.sum_eq_zero_iff",
    "List.exists_mem_of_ne_nil",
    "lt_irrefl"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Replaced non-existent linarom tactic with direct contradiction using List.sum_eq_zero_iff and positivity from p.pos."
  ]
}
